message:
feat(vc_store): add fsqlite workspace dependencies (bd-kjp)

Wire FrankenSQLite into the workspace so vc_store can begin migrating
from DuckDB. DuckDB dep kept temporarily until full migration complete.

- Workspace: fsqlite (path dep, json feature for JSON1 extension)
- Workspace: fsqlite-error, fsqlite-types (native feature)
- vc_store: fsqlite in [dependencies]

Unblocks: bd-bvt (port VcStore connection to fsqlite)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -15,6 +15,7 @@ vc_config.workspace = true
 asupersync.workspace = true
 asupersync-tokio-compat.workspace = true
 duckdb.workspace = true
+fsqlite.workspace = true
 serde.workspace = true
 serde_json.workspace = true
 thiserror.workspace = true
